name: ODYSSEY MARINE EXPLORATION INC
summary: Odyssey Marine Exploration, Inc. discovers, validates, and develops high-value seafloor mineral resources, including phosphate and other critical minerals. The company provides specialized mineral exploration, project development, and marine services to subsidiaries, other companies, and governments. Operating for nearly 30 years, Odyssey deploys ocean technology at depths up to 6,000 meters and maintains a diversified portfolio of subsea mineral projects worldwide, advancing them through environmental permitting, resource quantification, and extraction system design.

products.name: Phosagmex Project
products.description: Subsea phosphate sand extraction project in Mexico's Gulf of Ulloa, targeting high-grade phosphate ore 70-90 meters deep for fertilizer production.

products.name: Global Prospectivity Program
products.description: Proprietary program to identify and acquire new seafloor mineral asset opportunities for Odyssey's project portfolio.

products.name: Subsea Mineral Exploration and Development Services
products.description: Deep-ocean mineral exploration, project development, and marine services provided to clients including governments and other companies, sometimes in exchange for equity.

partnerships.description: Joint venture partner for the Phosagmex Project in Mexico, providing local business, political, and agricultural industry expertise.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
